name: exam-integrity-model
description: An open, interactive model for exam-integrity supply chains: a real SHA-256 custody chain, a genuine Shamir's Secret Sharing scheme, and a live text-similarity detector, built to accompany a public case study of the 2026 NEET-UG leak.

scripts.lint: node --check src/custody-chain.js && node --check src/shamir.js && node --check src/similarity.js && node --check demo/app.js
